audience: Codex, Claude, Gemini, Starlight operators, and creator/builders
firstRead: A working MCP-native research canvas with source nodes, actions, run logs, and local state.
references: ACOS workflow gates and trajectory memory

direction.keep: Dense local-first command workspace with visible source intake, typed graph state, inspector, action drawer, and MCP-safe context controls.
direction.avoid: Generic SaaS landing shell, fake metrics, decorative 3D, hidden primary actions, or destructive agent controls.
direction.signature: Nocturnal Starlight command graph where human source mapping and agent actions share the same inspectable canvas.
direction.system: Premium Web OS, React Flow, local file store, safe MCP tools, deterministic source-grounded actions.

asset_quality.why_premium: Screenshots show the real production UI and real local canvas state, not mockups or decorative filler.

artifacts.kind: desktop context, citation, and search screenshot
desktop setup and MCP status screenshot
mobile setup and MCP status screenshot
desktop mapped source and inspector screenshot

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.notes: Tier A real product captures from the local production preview.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.notes: Desktop and mobile screenshots inspected through Codex image viewer.

checks.name: desktop-layout
checks.notes: Composer, smart intake chips, graph, rails, toolbar, selected context, inspector, edge kind, search, setup/MCP status, export, and import controls are visible without incoherent overlap.

checks.name: mobile-layout
checks.notes: Mobile stacks composer, smart intake chips, graph, toolbar, rails, setup, and inspector without clipped primary controls.

checks.name: reduced-motion
checks.notes: Track A only; reduced-motion screenshot exists and no heavy scroll/3D path is used.

checks.name: setup-mcp-status
checks.notes: The app shows data home, MCP build, Codex config, Codex server wiring, safe paths, and copyable setup commands from a real local status route.

checks.name: human-intake-affordance
checks.notes: The first viewport now exposes clipboard paste, Map, Note, file upload, detected source chips, and created-node inspector selection.

verification.server: local production next start on 127.0.0.1:3101 through sds, left running for Frank review
verification.notes: Production screenshots inspected. Seeded Starlight Agent Canvas OS is connected, universal intake and source-grounded ask were visually verified, the canvas itself now exposes first-viewport composer controls, clipboard paste, smart detected-source chips, paste-anywhere, double-click notes, toolbar note creation, interactive empty-state actions, selected-context scoping, edge-kind selection, clickable local search evidence, editable inspector immediately after actions, source/action auto-selection, context copy, JSON/Markdown export, JSON import, in-app Setup/MCP status for local home, MCP build, and Codex wiring, mobile loads the graph below the composer before rails with a compact bottom toolbar, minimap is dark on desktop and hidden on mobile, reduced-motion media path is present.
